001.en_mandeville: And ye shal understande that this is noght the Temple that Salomon makyde, for that Temple lestid but a 1200 and 2 yer
001.an_escorial_mandeville: Jtem sabet que no es pas aqueill templo que salomon fezo Car aqueill templo non duro que .Mil. C. & dos. aynnos

002.en_mandeville: for Titus, and Vaspasianus son, that was emperour of Rome, that byseged Jerusalem to destroye Jewes, for they slow Crist withoute leve of the emperour
002.an_escorial_mandeville: Car thitus el fijo de vaspasian limperador de Roma qui tenia el siege al entorno de Jherusalem por esconfir los judios por causa que eillos auian muerto nuestro seynnor sin congia del Jmperador

003.en_mandeville: When he had take that cité, he leyt brenne the Temple and cast hit adoun, and took alle the Jewes
003.an_escorial_mandeville: Et quoando eill ouo presa la Cibdat eill quemo el templo & lo abbatio et priso todos los judios

004.en_mandeville: And other he put in prison and solde of hem 30 for oo peny, for they seyde they bought Crist for 30 pens
004.an_escorial_mandeville: Et los otros puso en preson Et los vendio a seruitud .xxx. por vn dinero Car eillos dizian que auian comprado nuestro seynnor por xxx. dineros

005.en_mandeville: And sithe Julius Apostata gaf leve to the Jewes to make the Temple for they hatid Cristen men
005.an_escorial_mandeville: Et empues dio lemperador jullian apastata congia alos Judios de Refazer el templo por causa que eill queria mal alos xpistianos

024.en_mandeville: And whenne the Jewes had makyd the Temple, as God wolde, hit was cast adoun
024.an_escorial_mandeville: Et quoando los judios aujan ya cerca fecho el templo por la voluntat de dios fue derribado todo lo que auian fecho

028.en_mandeville: And sith Adrian the emperour makyd Jerusalem agen and the Temple in the same maner that Salomon makyd hit
028.an_madrid_mandeville: Dende a cierto tiempo adrianus emperador que era de aquellos de troya refizo la ciudad de jerusalem y el templo en aquella mesma manera que salomon lo fizo

031.en_mandeville: And he wolde that no Jewe sholde dwelle ther but Cristen men, for he thoughte, thow they ne were Cristen men, they loved more Cristen men than eny other men, save men of his owen feith
031.an_madrid_mandeville: Y no quiso que en ningun tiempo algun judio ende vuiesse sino christianos avn quel mesmo christiano no fuesse: mas amaua mucho alos cristianos mas que alos judios ni otra alguna gente

036.en_mandeville: And this Adrian let close and walle the cherche of the Holy Sepulcre withynne the cité — that byfore was withoute — and wolde have y-chaunged the name of Jerusalem and calle hit Animote holy: that name last noght longe
036.an_escorial_mandeville: Aqueill jmperador fezo cerrar & murar la yglesia de sant sepulcre con la Cibdat que antes estaua luenga de fuera la cibdat & queria mudar el nombre de Jherusalem et la clamaua helia mas aqueill nombre non duro goaires

041.en_mandeville: the Sarizyns doth gret worship to that Temple, for they seyn that place is ryght holy
041.an_escorial_mandeville: los moros fazen muy grant Reuerencia a daqueill templo et dizen bien que aqueill logar es muy santo

044.en_mandeville: And when they gon thiderynne, they goon barefoot and knelith adoun many tymes
044.an_escorial_mandeville: Et y entran todos escalços & se y agenoillan amenudo

051.en_mandeville: And this Temple is of wydnesse 64 cubites and also moch of leynthe
051.an_escorial_mandeville: Et ha .lxiiij. cobdos de amplo & otro tanto de luengo

055.en_mandeville: And it is covered with lead, and hit is withynne al aboute ful of pilouris of marbel
055.an_escorial_mandeville: Et es cobierto de plomo Et y ha de dentro todo al torno delos pillares de marbre

056.en_mandeville: And in the myddel of this Temple is a high stage with pylouris aboute hit
056.an_escorial_mandeville: Et en medio del templo y ha mas alto estage & pillares todo al torno

057.en_mandeville: This place is y-called Sancta Sanctorum

058.en_mandeville: And in that place cometh noon other but the prelate which that maketh her sacrifise
058.an_escorial_mandeville: Ailli no y entraua sino el prelado que fazia el misterio del sacrifficio

064.en_mandeville: And ther beth 4 ontrees to the Temple, and the dores ben of cipresse wel y-dight
064.an_escorial_mandeville: En aqueill templo y ha .iiijo. entradas & son las puertas de cipres bien entailladas

066.en_mandeville: And withynne the north dore is a poule of water
066.an_escorial_mandeville: Et enla partida de north dentro enlas puertas y ha vna fuent

068.en_mandeville: of which Holy Wryt spekith and seith thus: Vidi aquam egredientem
068.an_escorial_mandeville: dela quoal santa escriptura fabla Vidi aquam egredientem

069.en_mandeville: And on that other syde is the huge roch that somtyme was called Morarche, but afterward hit was y-called Beleth, other Arke of God, with relikes of Jewes
069.an_escorial_mandeville: de cerca la otra part del templo y ha vna Roqua que se solia clamar moriath Mas depues se clamaua bethel en larcha de nuestro seynnor do las Reliquias delos judios heran puestas

075.en_mandeville: This Arke let Titus lede with the same relikes to Rome when he hadde destruyed the Jewes
075.an_escorial_mandeville: aqueilla archa conlas Reliquias fezo thitus traher ala grant Roma quoando eill auia desconffido los judios

077.en_mandeville: In that Arke were the 10 Commaundemens and som of Aarons yerd and of Moyses yerd
077.an_escorial_mandeville: En aqueilla archa estauan las tablas delos .x. mandamientos et la verga de aaron el propheta & la verga de moises

080.en_mandeville: with the which he departyd the Rede See when the peple of Israel passide thorghout foot-dry
080.an_escorial_mandeville: dela quoall eill partio la mar Roya quoando el pueblo de israhel passo a seth

082.en_mandeville: And with that yerd he smot the roch, and water com out of hym, and with that yerd he dide many wondres
082.an_escorial_mandeville: Et daqueilla verga eill ferio la Roqua & lagoa saillio fuera Et de aqueilla verga eill fezo muchas maraueillas

085.en_mandeville: And ther was a vessel of goold ful of manna, and clothyng, and ornamentes, and the tabernacle of Aaron
085.an_escorial_mandeville: Et si y auia en vn vaxiello doro pleno de manna Et los vestimentes & los ornamentes & el tabernaculo de aaron

088.en_mandeville: And ther was a table, squar, of goold with 12 precious stones of Our Lord withynne, and a tabernacle of goold, and trumpes of sylver, and a table of sylver, and other relikes that were byfore
088.an_escorial_mandeville: & vna tabla quoadrada de oro con .xij. piedras preciosas de nuestro seynnor de dentro con vn tabernaculo doro & trompas de plata & vna tabla de plata Et todas las otras Reliquias que heran ante

103.en_mandeville: And uppon that roch that Moyses smote, ther sleep Jacob when he saw angelis go up and doun by a scale, and seyde thus: Vere locus iste sanctus est et ego nesciebam
103.an_escorial_mandeville: jtem sobre aqueilla Roqua de betel dormio jacob quoando eill vio los angeles puyar & deuaillar por vna escallera et dixo vere locus iste sanctus est & ego nesciebam

110.en_mandeville: And Jacob heilde stylle ther an angel and chaunged his name and called hym Israel
110.an_escorial_mandeville: Et ailli Retenio Jacob vn angel el qual angel mudo el nombre de jacob et lo clamaua jsrael

112.en_mandeville: And in that place saw David the angel that smot the peple with a swerd
112.an_escorial_mandeville: Et en aqueill mesmo logar vio dauid vn angel qui troncaua el pueblo con vna espada

115.en_mandeville: And in the roche He sette Hym when the Jewes wolde have y-stened Hym, and that roch cleff in two
115.an_escorial_mandeville: Et sobre aqueilla Roqua se puso quoando los judios lo querian lapidar & la Roqua se fendio

118.en_mandeville: and in that clyft He hydde Hym
118.an_escorial_mandeville: Et en aqueilla fendedura eill se escondio

119.en_mandeville: And ther forgaf Our Lord the womman that was y-take in adulteri
119.an_escorial_mandeville: Ailli perdono nuestro seynnor el peccado ala muger que fue trobada en luxuria

120.en_mandeville: And ther the angel denounced the nativité of Seynt John the Baptist
120.an_escorial_mandeville: Ailli denuncio langel a zacharias la conception de su fijo sant Johan babtista

121.en_mandeville: And ther preyde David to Our Lord and to the angel that He wolde have mercy on hym and of his peple
121.an_escorial_mandeville: Sobre aqueilla Roqua se echo dauit Rogando nuestro seynnor & a langel que eill auia visto tranchar el pueblo que nuestro seynnor quisiesse auer misericordia deill & del pueblo

122.en_mandeville: And Our Lord herde hym and his prayer
122.an_escorial_mandeville: Et nuestro seynnor oyo su Rogaria

123.en_mandeville: And therfore he wolde have makyd a temple in that place, but Our Lord forbed hym by a angel, for he hadde y-do treson when he dyde sle Urye, a good knyght, forto have his wiff
123.an_escorial_mandeville: Et por esto queria eill fundar en aqueill logar el templo Mas nuestro seynnor li deffendio por vn angel por causa que eill auja fecho traition quoando eill fezo matar vrias el vallient cauallero por cobdicia de auer su muger

124.en_mandeville: And therfore though he hadde ordeyned to make that temple, he lete Salomon his sone to make hit
124.an_escorial_mandeville: Et por esto todas las prouisiones que eill auia fechas & ordenadas por fazer el templo eill las dio a su fijo psalomon por fazer el templo Et assi lo hediffico salomon

125.en_mandeville: And he prayed Our Lord that alle thilke that prayed in that place devoutly and with good herte, that He wolde here hyre prayere
125.an_escorial_mandeville: Et Requerio a nuestro seynnor que todos aqueillos qui de buen coraçon lo Requerrian en aqueill logar de bethel que nuestro seynnor quisiesse oyr lures Requestas

126.en_mandeville: And Our Lord graunted hym, and therfor hit was y-called Templum of Counsel and helpe of God
126.an_escorial_mandeville: Et nuestro seynnor li ottorgo Et por esto se clama salemon el templo de conseillo & de ayuda de dios

127.en_mandeville: And toward the south is the temple of Salamon, that is a greet place and a fair place
127.an_escorial_mandeville: Et deste templo assaz cerca enta midia es el templo de salamon qui es muy beillo

128.en_mandeville: And in this place dwellen knyghtes that ben callid Templers, and that was the foundacion of hem
128.an_escorial_mandeville: En este templo solian fincar los cauailleros que se clamauan los templeros Et hera el fundamento de lur orden

129.en_mandeville: Toward the north syde is a fayr cherche of Seynt Anne, Our Lady moder. Ther was Our Lady conceyved
129.an_escorial_mandeville: De fuera la claustra del templo enta visse es vna muy beilla yglesia de santa anna Madre de Santa maria ailli fue Santa maria concebida

130.en_mandeville: And ther neygh lay somtyme Seynt Anne, but Seynt Elene leet translate her to Constantynople
130.an_escorial_mandeville: Et ailli de juso solia jazer santa anna Mas santa helena la fezo transportar a constantinoble

131.en_mandeville: In that cherche is a walle in the maner of a cisterne that is y-called probatica piscina, that hadde 5 entrees
131.an_escorial_mandeville: En aqueilla yglesia y ha vna fuent en manera de vna cueua clamada probada piscina que auia .v. entradas

132.en_mandeville: And in that was woned an angel to descende
132.an_escorial_mandeville: Et en aqueilla fuent solian los angeles descender

133.en_mandeville: And what man that ferst bathid hym therynne, after that steryng of that water, was y-makyd hool of alle sicknesse that he hadde
133.an_escorial_mandeville: Et empues el primero qui se baynnasse hera goarescido de quoalquiera Maladia que ouiesse

134.en_mandeville: And ther was a man in the palasye y-helyd, which was syke. And Crist seide thus: Tolle grabatum tuum et ambula
134.an_escorial_mandeville: ailli sano nuestro seynnor lombre paralitico qui auia estado malade Et dixo nuestro seynnor Tolle grabatum tuum & ambula

135.en_mandeville: And a lytel thenne was the hous of Kyng Herodes that let sle the Innocentes
135.an_escorial_mandeville: Et assaz de cerca estaua la casa del Rey herodes qui fezo matar los jnnocentes

136.en_mandeville: This Herodes was ful wyckyd man and fel, for he leet ferst sle his owen wyff, that he loved wel
136.an_escorial_mandeville: Aqueill Rey herodes fue muy malo & muy cruel Car eill fezo primerament matar su muger que auia preso

137.en_mandeville: And for greet love that he hadde to here, when she was deed he byheld here and waxe out of his wytte, and so was he long
137.an_escorial_mandeville: Et por la grant amor que eill auia a eilla quoando vio que hera muerta eill se torno Rabioso & fue fuera de seso gant pieça

138.en_mandeville: And sithen he come ageyn to hymself, and thenne let he sle his cheldren that he gat by that wyff
138.an_escorial_mandeville: Et depues goarescio Et empues fezo matar grandes fijos donzelles que eill auia ouido daqueilla muger

139.en_mandeville: And then he let sle that other wyff and a sone that he gat on her
139.an_escorial_mandeville: Et depues fezo matar la otra de sus mugeres & vn grant fijo que eill auia ouido deilla

140.en_mandeville: And when he saw that he sholde deye, he sente for his soster and alle the gret lordes of the contré, and let put all the gret lordes in a tour
140.an_escorial_mandeville: Et quoando eill veno enta su fin que eill fue malade que eill non podia escapar de su maladia eill jmbio por su hermana & por todos los seynnores grandes de su tierra Et quoando fueron venidos fezo todos los grandes seynnores meter en vna tor

141.en_mandeville: and seyde to his soster he wyste well that men of that contré wold make no sorwe for hym when he wer deed. And therfore he leet her swer that she sholde let smyte of the hedes of all the lordes when he were deed, and then sholde al the contré make sorwe for his deth and elles noght
141.an_escorial_mandeville: Et dixo a su hermana que eill sabia bien que ninguno non faria duelo la su muert Et por esto li fezo jurar que eilla faria taillar las cabeças a todos aqueillos grandes seynnores luego que eill seria muerto assi que toda la tierra faria duelo en su muert Car otrament non seria puint plorado

142.en_mandeville: And thus makyd he his testament. But his sostre wolde noght fulfille hit, for as sone as he was deed, she delyveryd alle the lordes, and bade hem go home to her owen places, and tolde hem what her brother wolde that she hadde y-do with hem
142.an_escorial_mandeville: Et assi fezo su testament Mas su hermana non lo complio pas Car luego que eill fue muerto eilla deliuro los seynnores dela tor et los jmbio a sus casas & les dixo como su hermano auia ordenado deillos

143.en_mandeville: And ye shal understonde that ther were thre Herodes of greet name. This of wham Y spak now was y-called Ascolonyte
143.an_escorial_mandeville: Et sabet que estauan en aqueill templo tres herodes de grant Renom Aqueill qui fezo matar los jnnocentes de que ja he fablado fue herodes ascalonitez

144.en_mandeville: And he that lete smyte of the hede of Seynt John the Baptist was Herodes Antipa
144.an_escorial_mandeville: Et aqueill qui fezo taillar la cabeça a sant Johan babtista fue herodes anthipa

145.en_mandeville: And Herodes Agrippa lete sle Seynt Jame
145.an_escorial_mandeville: Et herodes aggripes fezo Matar a san jayme

146.en_mandeville: Forthermore in the cité is the Cherche of the Saveour and ther is an arme of Seynt John Crisostome. And ther is the most partye of Seynt Steveneis heed
146.an_escorial_mandeville: Jtem mas auant enla Cibdat es la iglesia de sant saluador alli es el braço siniestro de sant johan crisostome Et la mayor partida dela cabeça de sant esteuan

147.en_mandeville: And in the other syde toward the south, a man may go to the Mount of Syon; ther is a fayr cherche of Seynt Jame, wher his hed was smyte of
147.an_escorial_mandeville: De lotra part enla Rua enta media assi como hombre va enta el mont de syon es la yglesia de sant jayme ailli do fue degoillado

148.en_mandeville: Now go we to the Mount Syon, and ther is a fayr cherch of God and of Oure Lady, wher she deyde
148.an_escorial_mandeville: es el mont de syon Ailli estaua vna muy beilla yglesia de nuestra dama & ailli morio

149.en_mandeville: And fro that place, she was y-bore with the aposteles to the Vale Josaphat
149.an_escorial_mandeville: Et dailla leuaron los apostolos a nuestra dama ata la val de Josaphat

150.en_mandeville: And ther is the stone that the angel bare to Our Lady fro the Mount Synay, and hit is of that colour of that roch of Seynt Katerin
150.an_escorial_mandeville: Ailli es la piedra que los angeles traxieron a nuestra dama del mont de synay Et es drechament dela color dela Roqua de santa katerina

257.en_mandeville: Also at the entré of the Mount Syon is a chapel, and at that chapel is that greet ston, and hit is large
257.an_escorial_mandeville: Item a lentrada del mont de syon es vna capiella et en aqueilla capeilla es vna piedra grande & ampla

263.en_mandeville: And ther is a litle pece of the pilour to which Our Lord was bounde when He was scorged
263.an_escorial_mandeville: Ailli y a tan bien vna piedra enel muro cerca la puerta dela colupna a que nuestro seynnor fue tormentado

265.en_mandeville: And ther was a hous that was that tyme the bysshopes of the Lawe
265.an_escorial_mandeville: Car ailli fue la casa de anna qui fue obispo delos judios en aqueill tiempo

267.en_mandeville: And in that same place Peter forsoke Our Lord 3
267.an_escorial_mandeville: Et ailli mesmo lo Renego sant pedro iij vezes

269.en_mandeville: And ther is a partye of the table on which God makyd His Maundy
269.an_escorial_mandeville: Et ailli mesmo ay vna partida dela tabla sobre que nuestro seynnor ceno con sus discipulos

277.en_mandeville: And ther apeyred Crist ferst to His disciples after His Uprysyng, and seyde: Pax vobis
277.an_escorial_mandeville: ailli apparescio primerament nuestro seynnor alos apostolos empues su Resurreccion & les dixo pax vobis

278.en_mandeville: And on that mount apered Crist to Seynt Thomas and bad hym asay His woundes, and thenne leved he ferst, and seyde thus: Dominus meus et deus meus
278.an_escorial_mandeville: Et mas auant enel mont de syon apparescio nuestro seynnor a sant thomas lapostol et li fezo tastar sus plagas al viijo dia de su Resurrection Donde primerament lo creyo sant thomas & dixo Deus meus & domjnus meus

284.en_mandeville: In that same place, byhynde the hyghe auter, were alle the apostoles on Wit Soneday, when the Holy Gost descended on hem in licknes of fire
284.an_escorial_mandeville: En aqueilla cappiella mesma cerca del grant altar seyan los apostollos el dia de penthecosta quoando el sant esprit descendio sobre eillos en forma de fuego

287.en_mandeville: And ther makyd God Pasche with His disciples
287.an_escorial_mandeville: ailli cellebro nuestro seynnor la paschoa con sus discipulos

288.en_mandeville: And ther slept John the Evaungelist
288.an_escorial_mandeville: Et ailli dormio sant johan euuangelista

291.en_mandeville: This Mount Syon is withynne the cité
291.an_escorial_mandeville: El mont de syon es dentro enla Cibdat

292.en_mandeville: And the cité is strengre on that syde than in eny other, for at the foot of Mount Syon is a fair castel and strong
292.an_escorial_mandeville: Et si es la cibdat mas fuert daqueilla part que de ninguna otra Car al pie del mont de syon y ha vn castiello beillo & fuert

296.en_mandeville: On the Mount Syon was Kyng David and Salomon y-beryed and many other also
296.an_escorial_mandeville: Enel mont de syon fueron enterrados el Rey dauit & el Rey Salomon & muchos otros Reyes de Jherusalem

318.en_mandeville: toward the Vale of Josaphat is a well that men callen Natatori Silo
318.an_escorial_mandeville: De jus el mont de syon enta la val de josaphat y ha vna fuent que se clama natatorio syloe

321.en_mandeville: Ther was Our Lord y-wassh when He was y-baptised
321.an_escorial_mandeville: Ailli fue nuestro seynnor lauado empues el babtismo

338.en_mandeville: In that feeld beth many tumbes of Cristen men, for ther beth many pilgrymes biried
338.an_escorial_mandeville: En aqueill campo y ha muchas tumbas de xpistianos Car ailli solian enterrar los pelegrinos muertos

322.en_mandeville: And ther nye is the synagoge wher Judas caste the 30 pens byfore the Jewes and Fariseis
322.an_escorial_mandeville: jtem ailli de cerca estaua la synagoga Et ailli echo judas los xxx dineros deuant eillos

323.en_mandeville: and seyde thus: Peccavi tradens sanguinem justum
323.an_escorial_mandeville: Et dizia que eill auia peccado a trahir nuestro seynnor

336.en_mandeville: And on the other syde of the Mount Syon toward the south, over the valley, is Acheldemak, that is to say the feeld of blood, that was bought with tho 30 pens
336.an_escorial_mandeville: Et del otra part del mont de syon enta midi vltra la vallea el trecho de vna piedra es alchedemach que quiere dizir el campo de sangre qui fue comprado por los xxx dineros

343.en_mandeville: And ther neygh is a cherch wher Our Lady mette with Elizabeth when they were bothe with chylde, and Seynt John stired in his moder wombe and dide worship to his makere
343.an_escorial_mandeville: enta las partidas doccident a vna legoa en vna yglesia do nuestra dama encontro & saludo a helisabet et estauan todas dos encintas et sant johan se mouia enel vientre de su madre & fezo Reuerencia a su creador

349.en_mandeville: And ther neygh is the castel of Emaux
349.an_escorial_mandeville: et daqueilla yglesia ha vna legoa al castiello de maux

354.en_mandeville: hit is called Mount Joye, for that may pylgrimes ferst y-se that cometh to Jerusalem
354.an_escorial_mandeville: el mont joye se clama montjoye Car daqueill logar veen los pelegrines desta partida primerament la Santa Cibdat de jherusalem

361.en_mandeville: And in the myddel of the Vale of Josaphat is a lytel ryver that is y-called Torrens Cedron
361.an_escorial_mandeville: Et enla meatat de aqueilla vaill es aqueill Rio et es vn chico Rigachuelo que se clama thorrens cedron

362.en_mandeville: And overtwert that ryver lay that tree, of which that Cros was maked, that men yede over
362.an_escorial_mandeville: Et por de c'aga de aqueill Rio et desuso al trauers Jazia larbor dela cruz Et passauan por de suso

363.en_mandeville: Also in that vale is a cherch of Our Lady, and ther is the tumbe of Our Lady
363.an_escorial_mandeville: jtem enla meatat dela val de josaphat es la yglesia de nuestra dama Et y ha el sepulcro de nuestra dama

365.en_mandeville: And ney that is a place wher Judas kyssed Our Lord when He was y-take, that men callen Gessamain
365.an_escorial_mandeville: Et assaz cerca y ha vna cappiella que ha nombre gethsemanj Ailli fue nuestro seynnor besado de Judas et alli fue preso

366.en_mandeville: And Crist byleved ther His disciples byfore His Passion, when he yede to praye and seyde thus: Pater si fieri potest transeat a me calix iste
366.an_escorial_mandeville: Ailli leixo nuestro seynnor sus discipulos quoando eill fue a orar ante dela passion Rogando et diziendo Pater si potest transeat a me calix iste

367.en_mandeville: And ther is the tumbe of Kyng Josaphat, of wham the vale had his name
367.an_escorial_mandeville: Et assaz cerca de ailli es la tumba del Rey de josaphat de qui la val ha el nombre

398.en_mandeville: And at that oon syde of the vale is Mount Olyvete, and hit is called so for ther greweth many olyve treis
398.an_escorial_mandeville: Jtem de suso desta vaill es el mont de oliuet Et ha nombre assi por causa que y crescen muchos oliuos

399.en_mandeville: And hit is heyer than Jerusalem, and fro that hille men may se into the stretis of Jerusalem
399.an_escorial_mandeville: Aqueilla montaynna es mas alta que no es la Cibdat de Jherusalem Et por esto puede hombre de aqueilla montaynna veer por todas las Ruas de Jherusalem

402.en_mandeville: And bytwyne that hille and Jerusalem is noght but the Vale of Josaphat, and hit is noght ful large
402.an_escorial_mandeville: Et entre aqueilla montaynna et la Cibdat non ha que la val de josaphat que no es pas mucho ampla

403.en_mandeville: And on that hille stood Crist when He went to Hevene, and yit semeth ther the stappes of His lyft foot in the stoon
403.an_escorial_mandeville: De aqueilla montaynna puyo nuestro seynnor alos ciellos Et encora paresce enla piedra su senjestro pie

405.en_mandeville: And a lytel then is a chapel, in which chapel is a stoon on which Our Lord satte when He prechid and sayd thus: Beati pauperes spiritu
405.an_escorial_mandeville: Et cerca de ailli y ha vna cappiella do la piedra es sobre que nuestro seynnor se solia assentar et predicar Beati pauperes spiritu

406.en_mandeville: And ther He taughte His disciples her Pater Noster
406.an_escorial_mandeville: Et ailli eill enseynno a sus discipulos el pater noster

407.en_mandeville: And a litel then is Besfage, fro whom Crist sent Petre to fecche an asse on Palme Sonday
407.an_escorial_mandeville: Et mas ailla enta orient es berthfage do nuestro seynnor jmbio sant pedro por traherli lasna el dia de Ramos

409.en_mandeville: ther dwelled Symon lepre, that herborwed Our Lord
409.an_escorial_mandeville: Et ailli moraua Simeon el Mesiello Et alli fue loiado nuestro seynnor

410.en_mandeville: And he was y-called Julian. And that is he that men callen uppon for herborgh
410.an_escorial_mandeville: Et fue nombrado julian que hombre Require que li de buena posada por causa que eill alojo nuestro seynnor en su casa

430.en_mandeville: In that place God forgaff the synnes of Mari Maudeleyn
430.an_escorial_mandeville: Ailli mesmo perdonno nuestro seynnor el peccado a maria magdalena

431.en_mandeville: and ther she wasshid His feet with her teres of her eyen, and wiped hem with her here
431.an_escorial_mandeville: ailli eilla li lauo los pies con sus lagrimas et los exugo con sus cabeillos

434.en_mandeville: And ther was Lazar arered, that was dede four daies
434.an_escorial_mandeville: ailli Resucito nuestro seynnor a lazaro qui auia estado iiij dias muerto

442.en_mandeville: And ther ney is the stoon uppon which Our Lord sat and prechid many tymes
442.an_escorial_mandeville: Et assaz cerca es la piedra do nuestro seynnor se assentaua amenudo et predicaua

444.en_mandeville: and theruppon shal He sitte on the Day of Dome, as Hymself sayde
444.an_escorial_mandeville: Et ailli mesmo se assentara enel dia del jugament assi como eill mesmo dizia

446.en_mandeville: And ther ney is the Mount of Galilé wher the aposteles were y-gadered when Mary Maudeleyn tolde hem of Cristis Rysyng
446.an_escorial_mandeville: jtem cerca es el mont de galilea do los apostolos estauan ensemble quoando maria magdalena les veno a anunciar la Resurrection

450.en_mandeville: And bytwyne Mount Olivete and Mount Galilé is a chirche
450.an_escorial_mandeville: Jndo enta el mont doliuet et al mont de galilea y ha vna yglesia

454.en_mandeville: but hit was destruyed and now is ther but a litel toun
454.an_escorial_mandeville: Mas eilla es toda destruida Assi que non ay apresent sinon vna chica villa

455.en_mandeville: That toun toke Josue by miracle of God and byddyng of the angel
455.an_escorial_mandeville: Aqueilla Cibdat josue priso por miraglo de dios et por el comandament del angel

460.en_mandeville: And therfore she hadde a good reward of God

476.en_mandeville: and hit is ney a daies journey estward into a greet hille, wher Our Lord fasted 40 dayes
476.an_escorial_mandeville: et y ha cerca de vna Jornada enta orient ata la grant montaynna do nuestro seynnor dejuno xl dias

480.en_mandeville: and sayde thus: Dic ut lapides isti panes fiat
480.an_escorial_mandeville: Car eill dixo Dic ut lapides isti panes fiant

485.en_mandeville: And ther is an hermytage in the which dwelleth a maner of freres that men callen Georgens
485.an_escorial_mandeville: si non ay que vn hermitage que vna manera de xpistianos tienen que eillos fazen clamar georgianos

486.en_mandeville: And uppon that hille dwelled Abraham a greet while
486.an_escorial_mandeville: Sobre aqueilla montaynna finco abraham grant tiempo
